SEARCH
Package com.example.cmput301_app.model

Class Entrant

java.lang.Object
com.example.cmput301_app.model.Profile
com.example.cmput301_app.model.Entrant
public class Entrant extends Profile
Represents an entrant in the application. Extends Profile to inherit common user identity fields such as name, email, phone number, device ID, geolocation, and profile image. An entrant is a user who can browse events, join waiting lists, participate in lottery draws, and accept or decline invitations. Outstanding issues: - Invitation acceptance/declination currently updates local state only; Firebase sync is handled by EntrantDB. - Registration history outcome tracking depends on LotteryDB status updates.

    Description
    static class 
    Entrant.RegistrationRecord
    Represents a single entry in an entrant's registration history.

  • Constructor Details

    • Entrant

      public Entrant()
      Default no-argument constructor required for Firebase deserialization.

    • Entrant

      public Entrant(String deviceId, String name, String email, String phoneNumber)
      Constructs an Entrant with required profile fields. Notifications are enabled by default.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the unique device identifier for this user
      name - the full name of the entrant
      email - the email address of the entrant
      phoneNumber - the optional phone number of the entrant (pass null if not provided)

  • Method Details

    • joinWaitingList

      public void joinWaitingList(String eventId)
      Adds an event to the entrant's waiting list. Does nothing if the entrant is already on the waiting list for that event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event to join the waiting list for

    • leaveWaitingList

      public void leaveWaitingList(String eventId)
      Removes an event from the entrant's waiting list. Does nothing if the entrant is not on the waiting list for that event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event to leave the waiting list for

    • isOnWaitingList

      public boolean isOnWaitingList(String eventId)
      Returns whether the entrant is currently on the waiting list for a given event.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event to check
      Returns:
      true if the entrant is on the waiting list, false otherwise

    • acceptInvitation

      public void acceptInvitation(String eventId)
      Accepts a lottery invitation for the given event. Adds a RegistrationRecord with outcome ACCEPTED to the entrant's history and removes the event from the active waiting list.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event whose invitation is being accepted

    • declineInvitation

      public void declineInvitation(String eventId)
      Declines a lottery invitation for the given event. Adds a RegistrationRecord with outcome DECLINED to the entrant's history and removes the event from the active waiting list.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the ID of the event whose invitation is being declined

    • getWaitingListIds

      public List<String> getWaitingListIds()
      Returns the list of event IDs the entrant is currently on the waiting list for.
      Returns:
      list of waiting list event IDs

    • setWaitingListIds

      public void setWaitingListIds(List<String> waitingListIds)
      Sets the list of event IDs the entrant is currently on the waiting list for.
      Parameters:
      waitingListIds - the list of event IDs to assign

    • getRegistrationHistory

      public List<Entrant.RegistrationRecord> getRegistrationHistory()
      Returns the entrant's full registration history across all events.
      Returns:
      list of RegistrationRecord objects

    • setRegistrationHistory

      public void setRegistrationHistory(List<Entrant.RegistrationRecord> registrationHistory)
      Sets the entrant's registration history.
      Parameters:
      registrationHistory - the list of RegistrationRecord objects to assign

    • isNotificationsEnabled

      public boolean isNotificationsEnabled()
      Returns whether the entrant has notifications enabled for organizer and admin messages.
      Returns:
      true if notifications are enabled, false if opted out

    • setNotificationsEnabled

      public void setNotificationsEnabled(boolean notificationsEnabled)
      Sets whether the entrant receives notifications from organizers and admins.
      Parameters:
      notificationsEnabled - true to enable, false to opt out

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the transient UI status of this entrant for list rendering.

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the transient UI status of this entrant for list rendering.
